case_title: SGROMO, PETER A. VS GUARANTEE MORTGAGE CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUARANTEE MORTGAGE CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SGROMO, PETER A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUARANTEE MORTGAGE CORP. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO. NO RECOVERY. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING HE IS OWED THE ALLEDGED TEX PAYMENTS OF THE MORTGAGE COMPUTATION OR THE TITLE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,276.68 FILED BY SGROMO, PETER A. AS TO DEFENDANT GUARANTEE MORTGAGE CORP. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
